dependencies: tokenscope bun fix must be in place
New OpenCode session needed for accurate post-reduction validation
keyOutcomes: Complete per-component token breakdown of the system prompt
Local reductions applied: ~2,535 tokens saved (AGENTS.md + skills)
All skill YAML repaired, corruption removed, triggers metadata restored
Target <=15,000 not locally achievable - requires upstream OpenCode changes
summary: Audit and reduce the OpenCode system prompt from ~29,001 tokens to <=15,000 tokens by decomposing into discrete components, measuring each, and applying targeted reductions to AGENTS.md, skill descriptions, subagent definitions, and MCP tool schemas.
title: System Prompt Token Audit & Reduction
risks: Base agent prompt may be non-configurable
Compressed AGENTS.md may cause behavior regression
Token estimation is approximate (no model-specific tokenizer)
